entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop being improved for yield and disease resistance

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A devastating fungal disease that negatively impacts chickpea yield

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The overall productivity of the crop

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM F.SP. CICERI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing Fusarium wilt in chickpeas

entities.name: PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The process of combining multiple resistance genes into a single cultivar

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding technique using molecular markers to introgress specific traits into a recurrent parent

entities.name: GA16
entities.description: An SSR marker used for foreground selection of resistance genes

entities.name: TA 27
entities.description: An SSR marker used for foreground selection of resistance genes

entities.name: TA 96
entities.description: An SSR marker used for foreground selection of resistance genes

entities.name: FOREGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: The use of markers to select for the presence of the target gene/trait

entities.name: BACKGROUND SELECTION
entities.description: The use of markers to select for the recovery of the recurrent parent genome

entities.name: RECURRENT PARENT GENOME
entities.description: The genetic background of the parent variety being improved

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grain produced per unit area, measured in kg/ha

entities.name: DAYS TO FIFTY PERCENT FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for 50% of the crop population to reach flowering stage

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach full maturity

entities.name: 100 SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, used as a measure of seed size

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency or severity of disease occurrence in the population

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to evaluate genotype stability and performance across environments

entities.name: ADVANCED VARIETAL TRIALS
entities.description: The final stage of testing for advanced lines before official variety release

entities.description: The country where the research and cultivation take place
